timeline.text: Transplanted into Autopot XL; hand-watering begins
Labeled Plant C; no purple; most vigorous
3 nodes, broader leaf morphology, aerial root hairs visible — most developmentally advanced; no purple
~3 nodes, most advanced, strong symmetrical growth, no purple
3 nodes, most vigorous, no purple; RH concern noted
⚠️ Lighter green + edge spotting on older leaves — pH verification needed
⚠️ Worsening — brown/rust spots on multiple leaves; stress-induced purple now visible on stems/petioles (NOT genetic); runoff pH/EC check required
No new observations; runoff pH/EC test still pending; leaf issue unresolved
**Topped above node 4**; leaf issue diagnosed as foliar burn (splash), not pH lockout — resolved; normal recovery expected
Recovery Day 6; compact healthy branching; **LST due now**; moisture stable ~40–42%
compact healthy canopy; **LST overdue** (Day 7 post-topping); moisture stable ~45%
compact symmetrical medium-green canopy; clean leaves; **LST critically overdue** (Day 8 post-topping); moisture stable ~51%

note.text: Day 37, eight days post-topping: compact symmetrical medium-green multi-branch canopy; stable autopot moisture (~51%); clean leaves; LST critically overdue. See [2026-04-20](../daily/2026-04-20.md).
